name: milo-pro
description: Mini ERP for repair shop and retail management

scripts.start: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.start:react: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.start:sqlite: set DATABASE_DIALECT=sqlite&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.start:postgres: set DATABASE_DIALECT=postgres&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:react: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:sqlite: set DATABASE_DIALECT=sqlite&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:postgres: set DATABASE_DIALECT=postgres&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.validate:postgres: npm run build:backend && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run preflight:postgres && npm run test:postgres-adapter && npm run test:postgres-bootstrap && npm run test:db-config && npm run test:runtime-db-boundary
scripts.check:syntax: node --check backend/src/config/database.js && node --check backend/src/config/auth.js && node --check backend/src/routes/auth.js && node --check backend/src/routes/categories.js && node --check backend/src/routes/customers.js && node --check backend/src/routes/dashboard.js && node --check backend/src/routes/deviceOptions.js && node --check backend/src/routes/products.js && node --check backend/src/routes/purchases.js && node --check backend/src/routes/repairs.js && node --check backend/src/routes/reports.js && node --check backend/src/routes/sales.js && node --check backend/src/routes/settings.js && node --check backend/src/routes/woocommerce.js && node --check backend/src/services/woo-order-client.js && node --check backend/src/services/woo-order-importer.js && node --check backend/src/services/woo-order-sync.js && node --check scripts/woo-sync-orders.js
scripts.test: node tests/auth-customers-routes.test.js && node tests/products-repairs-routes.test.js && node tests/sales-routes.test.js && node tests/purchases-routes.test.js && node tests/woo-order-sync.test.js && node tests/woo-order-config.test.js && node tests/woocommerce-routes.test.js
scripts.validate: npm run build:backend && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run check:syntax && npm test
